nodes.label: Application Logo — blue triangular 'mountain/A' mark with white diagonal chevron cutout (duplicated as logo16/32/44/256.png in both private/images/ and public/images/, 8 files total, identical artwork at different resolutions)

nodes.label: Turns/ValClass DB Setup Script
nodes.rationale: SQL Server 2005-compatible DDL (no GO/CONCAT/DATETIME2) for the MM turns/valuation-class feature; stores data pulled from SapServer PerformanceController turns-valclass endpoints.

nodes.label: dbo.TurnsValClassSnapshot
nodes.rationale: One row per material/plant, TRUNCATE+reinsert on every sync like other *Snapshot tables. 13-month consumption history and demand forecast stored as wide columns (M12..M00) so the existing replaceTable() UNION ALL batch insert works unchanged.

nodes.label: dbo.ValuationClassCatalog
nodes.rationale: Valid valuation classes per material type (T025/T025T/T134) for the change-valuation-class dropdown.

nodes.label: dbo.ValuationClassChangeBatch
nodes.rationale: Append-only audit header, one row per change-valuation-class POST: order, plant, who, when, total value change.

nodes.label: dbo.ValuationClassChangeDetail
nodes.rationale: One row per material within a change batch; mirrors ValClassChangeResult from SapServer.

nodes.label: Raw SQL Console page (rawsql.html)
nodes.rationale: Ad-hoc query console for testing against the SQL2005 Bridge /query endpoint; destructive keywords blocked for non-admin users and all commands logged

nodes.label: Open Runs (supervisor cancel queue)
nodes.rationale: Lists Status=1 runs across all processes so a supervisor can cancel entries that can never be completed (e.g. created before profit-centre validation existed).
